acceptedVia: chat 2026-07-23 — per-figure verdicts pasted and confirmed
recordTitle: Tag-filter figure sheet — two approved, one revised
summary: The data-flow and decision figures are approved for the documentation; the module-seams figure returns for revision with lighter dependency annotation.

decisions.rationale: Data-flow and decision read at a glance; the seams arrow annotation needs less weight.

exampleWorking.conclusion: Seams figure: thin the side arrow and mute its labels; the layers themselves are right.

canonicalBody:
# Tag-filter figure sheet

Approved: URL-to-DOM data flow; the one branch (unknown tags are a state,
not an error). Revision: module seams — dependency annotation reads heavier
than the layers it describes.
